passives.desc:
In this Encounter, when this unit takes damage that brings their HP down to 0, nullify that damage and apply the following effects (once per Encounter):
- Heal max HP and remove all removable negative effects from this unit
- For this Encounter, gain 1 [Vulnerable] and fix [TimeEntangleUnstable] to 1. Take (# of current turn x 10) fixed damage at the end of every turn
- Afterward, end turn and the attack pattern becomes empowered
passives.name: The Final Battle

passives.desc:
Turn Start: At 0+ SP, gain 1 [SojiAbiAgeFuture]
Gain 1 [SojiAbiAgeFuture] for every 2 SP above 0

Turn Start: At less than 0 SP, gain 1 [SojiAbiAgePast]
Gain 1 [SojiAbiAgePast] for every 2 SP below 0
passives.name: From Dawn till Dusk

passives.desc:
Turn End: Gain 1 [TimeEntangleUnstable] for every 5 SP difference between this unit's current SP and SP at Turn Start (max 5 per turn)

For every 100 damage taken cumulatively, lose 1 [TimeEntangleUnstable] (including Shield damage)
passives.name: Spacetime Afterimage Collapse

passives.desc: Every few turns, use the "Destinated Opponent" Skill Only the target of this unit's attack can Clash with the said Skill Slot If this unit's "Destinated Opponent" Skill loses a Clash, take 36 ~ 60 fixed damage Combat End: If every "Destinated Opponent" Skill this unit used in this turn lost a Clash, gain 1 [Vulnerable] next turn
passives.name: Afterimage of the Future

passives.desc: Turn End: if in Panic, reset SP to 30.
passives.name: Panic Recovery

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.
passives.name: Fixed Panic

passives.desc:
Attack Skill End: Deal (# of Slash Coins that hit Critically x 10) Slash damage against each target) (damage from this effect cannot Stagger target)

Attack Skill End: Consume every surplus [Breath] Potency past 20 on self and inflict [PhantomIncision] to target by [Breath] Potency consumed
passives.name: Lacerating Afterimages from Myriad Moments

skills.desc:
[WideAreaRampage]
Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed; cannot be Staggered until this Skill ends
[DefeatDuel] Deal -80% damage and damage dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target
skills.name: Formless Cut [無形斬]

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [PhantomIncision] for every 1% missing HP on target
[OnSucceedAttack] Consume all [PhantomIncision] on target and deal ([PhantomIncision] consumed)% HP damage

skills.desc:
This Skill does not trigger the target's Defense Skill
Prioritizes the target with the least HP percentage
- Prioritizes targets that aren't Ryōshū
skills.name: Deathedge [絶命]

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Consume all [PhantomIncision] on target and deal ([PhantomIncision] consumed)% HP damage against each target hit, respectively

skills.desc:
Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed; this unit cannot be Staggered until this Skill ends
[WhenUse] At 20+ SP, generate 3 Mang. Final Power +10
[EndSkill] If this Skill generated Mang, lose 20 SP
[WinDuel] Gain 2 [SlashDamageUp]
[DefeatDuel] Deal -80% damage and damage dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target
skills.name: Uttermost Rend Space - String Severance [空間斬 - 絕緣]

skills.desc: Only targets with the corresponding buff among [SojiAbiBuffOne], [SojiAbiBuffTwo], or [SojiAbiBuffThree] can Clash with this Skill This Skill does not trigger the target's Defense Skill [DefeatDuel] Gain 1 [Vulnerable] [DefeatDuel] Remove [SojiAbiBuffOne], [SojiAbiBuffTwo], [SojiAbiBuffThree] from target [OnDirectAttack] Final Power +10
skills.name: Destinated Opponent

skills.desc: [DefeatDuel] Deal -80% final damage and damage dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target
skills.name: Twinslash - Echoshear [二連 - 殘]

skills.desc: [EndSkill] Reuse this Skill if target is defeated or Staggered (3 times per turn)
skills.name: Inevitable Termination [必然殺]

skills.desc: [StartBattle] If the Skill Slot using this Skill is a main target of an Attack Skill, lose 10 [Breath] Potency
skills.name: Resentment [怨望]

skills.desc: [StartBattle] If the Skill Slot using this Skill is a main target of an Attack Skill, lose 5 SP
skills.name: Futility [非望]
